---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a small, issue-driven feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal
Describe the user-facing goal or outcome this feature should deliver.

## Background
Explain the context, user need, or problem this feature addresses.

## Scope
List the specific changes that should be included in this issue.

## Out of Scope
List related work that should not be included in this issue.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The feature meets the stated goal.
- [ ] Changes stay small and issue-driven.
- [ ] No unrelated files are modified.

## Suggested Files
List likely files or folders to inspect or change. Keep this list narrow and update it if discovery changes the plan.

## Test Plan
Describe the checks needed to verify the feature, including manual steps and automated tests when available.

## Notes for AI
- Read AGENTS.md first
- Keep changes small and issue-driven
- Do not modify unrelated files
- Do not create extra markdown files
- Do not commit secrets or .env files
